steps.title: Read two points
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward. Two clear approximate points on the line are $(0,14)$ and $(13,0)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Use change in $y$ divided by change in $x$.
$$m=\frac{0-14}{13-0}=-\frac{14}{13}=-1.08$$
The closest listed value is $-1.1$. The answer is B.
